creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Created attachment 150908
scanning/deleting datasets for old snpahsots instead of pools

If [hourly|daily|weekly|monthly]_zfs_snapshot_skip is set in periodic.conf to skip only parent dataset, but do snapshots for subsequent datasets
(which would read like this for example:
  hourly_zfs_snapshot_skip="machineSATAHD3x5k9RZ1$ machineSATAHD3x5k9RZ1/netshares$ machineSATAHD3x5k9RZ1.p0/VOLUMES)
deleting old snapshots won't happen because only snapshots for pool definitiones are scanned, not for datasets of pools.
Attached is a very quick patch which seems to do what I want in one case. Haven't done any further testings nor really carefully thought about, I just needed a quick solution.
